add_child.name: Add child
add_child.description: Adds a child to Chores Manager.

name.name: Name
name.description: The display name of the child.

update_child.name: Update child
update_child.description: Updates a child's display name without changing stable IDs or completion history.

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: The stable ID of the child to update.

name.name: Name
name.description: The new display name of the child.

add_chore.name: Add chore
add_chore.description: Adds a reusable chore and assigns it to children.

title.name: Title
title.description: The display title of the chore.

category.name: Category
category.description: The category used to group the chore.

points.name: Points
points.description: The number of points awarded for completion.

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: The icon used to represent the chore.

sort_order.name: Sort order
sort_order.description: The display order. When omitted, an order is generated automatically.

child_ids.name: Children
child_ids.description: Child IDs to assign. When omitted, all active children are assigned.

add_assignment.name: Add assignment
add_assignment.description: Assigns an existing chore to an existing active child.

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: The stable ID of the child to assign.

chore_id.name: Chore ID
chore_id.description: The stable ID of the chore to assign.

delete_assignment.name: Delete assignment
delete_assignment.description: Deletes one child-to-chore assignment and removes its switch while preserving completion history.

assignment_id.name: Assignment ID
assignment_id.description: The stable ID of the assignment to delete.

delete_child.name: Delete child
delete_child.description: Deletes a child and that child's assignments while preserving completion history.

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: The stable ID of the child to delete.

delete_chore.name: Delete chore
delete_chore.description: Deletes a chore and its assignments while preserving completion history.

chore_id.name: Chore ID
chore_id.description: The stable ID of the chore to delete.

set_assignment_active.name: Set assignment active
set_assignment_active.description: Activates or deactivates one child-to-chore assignment without deleting it or its history.

assignment_id.name: Assignment ID
assignment_id.description: The stable ID of the assignment to update.

active.name: Active
active.description: Whether the assignment switch should be active when its child and chore are active.

update_chore.name: Update chore
update_chore.description: Updates editable chore metadata without changing stable IDs or completion history.

chore_id.name: Chore ID
chore_id.description: The stable ID of the chore to update.

title.name: Title
title.description: A new display title for the chore.

category.name: Category
category.description: A new category for the chore.

points.name: Points
points.description: A new point value for future completions.

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: A new icon for the chore.

sort_order.name: Sort order
sort_order.description: A new display order for the chore.

set_child_active.name: Set child active
set_child_active.description: Activates or deactivates a child without deleting assignments or history.

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: The stable ID of the child to update.

active.name: Active
active.description: Whether the child, weekly-points sensor, and assignment switches should be active.

set_chore_active.name: Set chore active
set_chore_active.description: Activates or deactivates a chore without deleting it or its history.

chore_id.name: Chore ID
chore_id.description: The stable ID of the chore to update.

active.name: Active
active.description: Whether the chore and its assignment switches should be active.

integration_not_loaded.message: Chores Manager is not currently loaded.

duplicate_assignment.message: Child {child_id} is already assigned to chore {chore_id} as {assignment_id}.

inactive_child.message: Child {child_id} is inactive. Activate the child before adding an assignment.

inactive_chore.message: Chore {chore_id} is inactive. Activate the chore before adding an assignment.

no_chore_updates.message: Provide at least one chore field to update.

no_active_children.message: No active children are available. Add or activate a child before adding a chore.

error.integration_not_loaded: Chores Manager is not currently loaded.
error.no_active_children: Add or activate a child before adding a chore.
error.no_chore_updates: Change at least one chore field.
error.unknown_error: Chores Manager could not complete that change.
error.duplicate_assignment: That child and chore already have an assignment.
error.no_active_assignment_children: Add or activate a child before adding an assignment.
error.no_active_assignment_chores: Add or activate a chore before adding an assignment.
error.no_available_assignment_pairs: Every active child and chore combination already has an assignment.

delete_child.description: Delete {name}? This also removes the child's assignments and their entities. Completion history is kept.
